assertions.description: INCORRECT: Gerber-Mix1, Mix2, and Mix3 all contain an ESP32-adapter-pan.GML file with TF.FileFunction=Profile,NP (Edge.Cuts). The analyzer parses 7 of the 8 gerber files in each set, excludes the GML entirely, and falsely reports Edge.Cuts as missing. The GBR file (FileFunction=Other,User) is parsed but correctly classified as 'unknown'. This confirms the .GML recognition gap is systemic, not repo-specific.
